Method–provenance block

• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent requested).
• Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (0, 1); cation and anion treated as doublets (1+, 2) and (1–, 2).
• Software/backend: xTB 6.5 via chemkit “fukui-reactivity” skill.
• Convergence: all three SCF calculations converged; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true.
